query:
SELECT 'products' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM products WHERE po_number = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'station_tasks' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.product_id WHERE p.po_number = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'station_events' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM station_events se INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = se.product_id WHERE p.po_number = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sampling_results' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM sampling_results sr INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = sr.product_id WHERE p.po_number = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'productivity_score_details' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM productivity_score_details psd INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = psd.product_id WHERE p.po_number = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'engineer_daily_productivity' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(edp.station_points_json, '$."PO-20260512-01"') IS NOT NULL;
